items.title: Dependencies and reactive values: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? An empty dependency array makes any effect safe to run once with permanently current values.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Dependencies must match reactive reads; an empty array can capture stale initial values.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Dependencies must match reactive reads; an empty array can capture stale initial values.

criteria.description: Selects the source-linked React: Component-Based Browser Applications correction rather than the documented misconception.

items.title: Dependencies and reactive values: verified implementation facet
items.prompt: Declare every reactive dependency and restructure code instead of suppressing the hooks linter. Build a bounded artifact demonstrating effect reruns from declared topic dependency; the locked browser verifier checks observable structure, behavior, or computed presentation.

feedback.incorrect: At least one deterministic authoring check failed; inspect the exact artifact, interaction state, viewport, and observable result without assuming hidden-case details.
